intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant "Pyrus domugledica". However, I can provide information on Pyrus communis, the common pear tree, which is a possible alternative.

Pyrus communis is a deciduous tree species within the genus Pyrus, commonly known as the pear tree. The health benefits of Pyrus communis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health due to its high content of dietary fiber, vitamins, and minerals. The bioactive constituents of Pyrus communis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Pyrus communis include pear juice, pear extracts, and dried pear fruit, often used in traditional medicine and culinary applications.
